name: kakeibo-journal
description: Kakeibo Journal — a calm, step-by-step digital Kakeibo budgeting journal (mobile-first PWA)

scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && cap sync android
scripts.android:apk: npm run build && cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:aab: npm run build && cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease
